name: BLOODKILL
short_description: BRUTAL First Person Shooter focused on action, gore, and exploration. Fueled by adrenaline-pumping trap-metal soundtrack.
detailed_description:
BRUTAL First Person Shooter focused on action, gore, and exploration. Fueled by adrenaline-pumping trap-metal soundtrack.

Dismember hordes of evil monsters, find secrets, master bunny hopping, and tear enemies apart with powerful guns!

  • Fast movement with bunny hopping, lots of blood

  • Adrenaline-pumping trap-metal soundtrack!

  • Diverse enemies: from Shadowclaws to 5 headed Hydras, all want to see you gutted!

  • 5 different levels, on each level you will find new guns, secrets and encounter new gameplay situations, providing around 4+ hours of action packed experience.

  • 9 guns at your disposal, each one can be enhanced by exploring levels and finding enhanced ammo.

  • Conquer 3 unique bosses in a challenging fights.

  • Simple environments but enhanced by Unreal Engine 5's Lumen software ray tracing providing great lighting! Combined with optimizations and shader precompilation ensuring stutter-free experience!

Play a game inspired by classic shooters like Painkiller, Serious Sam and DOOM.

Enjoy non-stop action and gameplay without interruptions.

Game made by one person - may contain bugs and other issues.
